# Green Sheet Design System — AI Reference (domain-neutral spec)

Tailwind v4 design system for data-grid-centric web applications.
Paper-and-ink theme: no shadows, layering by surface color + 1px lines,
4 semantic color families, dark surfaces reserved for machine-authored content.
Use this file as the ONLY context when generating UI with this system.
Do not copy sample data, product names, or copy text from the docs pages —
they are illustrations, not part of the system.

Setup: `@import "green-sheet-design-system/theme.css";` (includes `@import "tailwindcss"`).
All tokens below are Tailwind v4 `@theme` values → usable as utilities
(`bg-paper`, `text-ink-soft`, `border-line`, `rounded-chip`, `text-dense`, `max-w-wrap`, `fold:`).

## Color tokens (24 — never invent new colors)

Surfaces (elevation = surface color + 1px border; box-shadow for elevation is FORBIDDEN):
- paper   #F4F6F1  page/app background, sidebar
- panel   #FFFFFF  cards, panels, data cells, toolbars
- sunken  #EDF1EA  table headers, row-number gutters, status bars, disabled surfaces

Lines (exactly two weights):
- line       #DCE3DA  structure — panel/card borders, layout separators
- line-soft  #E4E9E1  inside data — cell grids, row separators, chart gridlines

Ink:
- ink        #1B2730  body text; also THE background of dark surfaces
- ink-soft   #5C6E7A  secondary text, labels, chart axes
- ink-muted  #B9C2BB  empty cells, disabled, placeholders

Semantic families — each family has EXACTLY ONE meaning. Never use for generic emphasis.
- GREEN = primary action · selected · passed/confirmed
  green #1E7A5A (action, active border, focus ring, chart series 1) ·
  green-deep #135C43 (text on green-soft) · green-soft #E2F0E9 (selected bg, mark underline) ·
  green-bright #7FD1A7 (on dark: code keywords, chips)
- AMBER = attention · cross-view link highlight (NOT an error)
  amber #EFAF3B (highlight ring/marker, chart series 2) · amber-soft #FBF1DA (hover/link bg,
  accent rows, warning notes) · amber-ink #8A6414 (text on amber-soft) ·
  amber-code #F0C674 (on dark: code strings)
- RED = excluded · negative · destructive (broader than failure; values must stay readable)
  red #BE5B4E (excluded badge bg w/ white text — the ONLY solid red allowed) ·
  red-soft #F8E9E6 (excluded row bg, danger hover) · red-ink #A3564C (error text) ·
  red-strike #D19288 (strikethrough, lighter than text so digits stay legible)
- PURPLE = metadata: derived/system-generated (about a value's origin, not the value)
  purple #6C5DA8 (chart series 3) · purple-soft #ECE9F6

Dark surface (machine-authored content ONLY — code, specs, logs, system toasts):
- background is `ink` itself · code-fg #D8E2DC body · code-dim #6B7F8C comments/labels
- semantic colors keep meaning on dark via green-bright (keywords) and amber-code (strings)

Charts have NO dedicated tokens: series order green → amber → purple,
gridlines line-soft, axes ink-soft. Flag uncertain data with opacity + dashed
stroke + text label — never by color alone.

## Typography

Families: --font-sans Pretendard stack · --font-mono JetBrains Mono stack.
Mono is a RULE, not a taste: only for machine-generated or column-aligned content
(numbers, identifiers, code, table headers, paths, page numbers). Right-aligned
numbers are always mono. 12-step scale (replaces Tailwind text-*):

display clamp(26–42px)/800 · title 21px/800 · lede 15px · body 14px ·
strong 13.5px (tab labels) · ui 13px (buttons, inputs, menus, panel titles) ·
dense 12.5px (table body) · num 12px mono (numbers/code) · meta 11.5px (hints) ·
micro 11px (tags/chips) · mono-sm 10.5px (table headers, tracking-th 0.05em) ·
badge 10px. Weight 800 only for display/title. Tracking: eyebrow 0.14em ·
tag 0.1em · th 0.05em.

## Radius (personality scale — rounder = further from data)

grid 0 (sheet cells, process steps) · chip 2px (badges, tabs, buttons, inputs, notes) ·
panel 3px (panels, cards, menus, modals, code blocks) · bar 1px (chart bars) ·
pill 20px — RESERVED for search/natural-language inputs and their buttons; the only curve.

## Layout tokens

max-w-wrap 1180px (document body) · max-w-lede 640px · max-w-sub 720px ·
breakpoint `fold:` 900px (2-col → 1-col). CSS vars: --side-w 224px sidebar ·
--top-h 46px top bar · --scroll-max 460px table viewport.
Cell padding vars: --cell-pad-grid 5px 9px · --cell-pad-row 5.5px 10px ·
--cell-pad-compact 3.5px 8px · --cell-pad-roomy 9px 12px.

## Component classes

Tables (the system's core):
- `.sheet` spreadsheet-style full grid (cell-level interaction). Children:
  `.rn` row-number gutter · `.hd` header cell · `.lbl` label · `.num` right mono number ·
  `td.v` interactive value cell (hover/`.hl` = amber-soft bg + inset 2px amber ring) ·
  `td.empty` sparse cell (ink-muted "–") · `td.co` muted mono center
- `.tbl` standard data table (row separators only). Children: `.num`, `.dim` (ink-soft).
  Row states on `<tr>`: `.hl` linked (amber bg + inset 3px left amber marker) ·
  `.sel` selected (green-soft bg + inset 3px left green marker) ·
  `.row-excl` excluded (red-soft bg, red-ink text, numbers struck with red-strike) ·
  `.row-accent` subtotal/attention row (amber-soft bg)
- Both: `th.sortable` + `.sort-asc`/`.sort-desc` (text arrows colored green) ·
  `th/td.chk` checkbox column · `tfoot td` totals (sunken bg, semibold, line top border)
- Density: `.tbl-compact` / `.tbl-roomy` (default is dense — intentional)
- AMBER = linked, GREEN = selected; the two meanings never swap.
- Sparse ≠ zero: an empty value renders as ink-muted "–", never "0".

Badges (one meaning each): `.badge` + `.badge-green` (passed/auto/confirmed) ·
`.badge-amber` (attention flag) · `.badge-red` (excluded/blocked — only solid badge) ·
`.badge-purple` (derived/system-generated) · `.badge-neutral` (stateless counts/types).

Surfaces: `.pane` (+ `.pane-head`, `.pane-foot`, `.pane-scroll`, `.pane-fill`) ·
`.ds-card` · `.ds-note` (amber note) · `.stat` KPI card (+ `.stat-label`, `.stat-value` mono,
`.stat-delta` + `-up` green / `-down` red-ink — always pair color with ▲▼ symbol).

Buttons: `.btn` (bordered, 2px radius) + `.btn-primary` (green solid, ONE per view) ·
`.btn-ghost` · `.btn-danger` (border + red-ink text; NEVER solid red) · `.btn-sm` ·
`:disabled`. Pill: `.btn-pill` / `.btn-pill-on` (natural-language/search only).
Tabs: `.tab` / `.tab-on`.

Forms: `.input` (+ `.input-pill`, `.input-invalid`) · `.select` · `.field` +
`.field-label` (mono-sm uppercase) + `.field-hint` / `.field-error` ·
`.checkbox` `.radio` (native + green accent) · `.switch` (immediate on/off) · `.kbd`.
Errors: red border + red-ink message — text, not color alone.

Grid chrome: `.toolbar` (+ `.toolbar-sep`, `.toolbar-spacer`, `.toolbar-count`) ·
`.pager` + `.pager-btn` / `.pager-btn-on` / `.pager-info` (mono) ·
`.statusbar` (sunken, mono-sm).

Navigation: `.crumbs` + `.crumb` / `.crumb-sep` / `.crumb-here` (mono — paths are
machine-made) · `.nav-group` + `.nav-item` / `.nav-item-on` (green-soft + inset 2px
left green marker) / `.nav-count` · `.menu` + `.menu-item` / `.menu-item-danger` /
`.menu-sep` / `.menu-label` / `.menu-kbd` (menus stand on borders, no shadow) ·
`.steps` + `.step` / `.step-off` / `.step-num` / `.step-title` / `.step-desc`
(0-radius steps interlocked with -1px margins — one continuous process, not buttons).

Feedback: `.alert` + `-green`/`-amber`/`-red`/`-neutral` (soft bg + same-family border) ·
`.toast` (+ `.toast-ok`, `.toast-warn`) — dark surface because the system speaks ·
`.scrim` (ink 40%) + `.modal` / `.modal-head` / `.modal-body` / `.modal-foot` ·
`.empty-state` (+ `.empty-title`, `.empty-desc`) — dashed border; empty data is not
an error · `.skeleton` (+ `-text`, `-num`).

Code (dark): `.code-surface` (+ `.code-surface-spec` max-height variant) ·
`.code-k` keyword green-bright · `.code-s` string amber-code · `.code-c` comment
code-dim · `.code-lab` label · `.rule-chip` (translucent green chip on dark).

App layout: `.app-shell` (h-screen grid rows [top|body]) → `.app-top` (+ `.app-brand`) →
`.app-body` (grid cols [sidebar|main]) → `.app-side` + `.app-main`.
Per view: `.page-head` (+ `.page-title`) → optional `.toolbar` → content →
`.pane-foot` pager → `.statusbar`. Split view: `.split` + `.split-side` / `.split-main`.

## Hard rules

1. One meaning per color family. Green ≠ "emphasis"; amber ≠ "warning-error"; never reuse.
2. No elevation shadows. All box-shadow uses are inset markers (cell ring, row marker,
   nav marker, `.u-mark` underline). Menus/modals stand on 1px borders.
3. Mono only for machine-made or column-aligned content. Right-aligned numbers: always mono.
4. Tables are dense by default (5–5.5px cell padding); change density only via variants.
5. Radius follows the personality scale; pill only for search/natural-language.
6. Sparse ≠ zero: empty values are ink-muted "–", never 0, never blank confusion.
7. Dark surfaces only for machine-authored content (code, specs, logs, system toasts).
8. Focus is always `outline-2 outline-green outline-offset-2` (:focus-visible).
9. Never convey state by color alone — pair with a word, symbol, or shape.
10. One `.btn-primary` per view; destructive actions are bordered, never solid red.
11. Interactions: background-color 120ms only; everything off under prefers-reduced-motion.
